reviews.review_title: Soy sauce can I have mod
reviews.review_description:
- this game is so good
- nice mods
- nice people
- good mods
- good clans  (I’m in uts clan)
- really fun
( soy sauce can I have mod please)
Edit/ I don’t really like being around Kenedy the co owner she is very hyper and could be kinda rude soy she said don’t talk s*%t about my best friend Dr right I wasn’t being rude and I just got confused because they sound the same to me I have an infection in my ears I accidentally called Dr right Kenedy and Dr right called Kenedy and things went upside down and got false banned an hour later I got unbanned and went to a pub and got of the vr
At 10 pm this is a fun game and I don’t wanna be rude but some of the community kinda sucks

Very good game there are a lot of cool features and I always have a good time playing it, it’s really fun to meet new people￼ lot, you get a lot of shiny rock rocks, and the staff is really good. There is a lot more to this game too that I don’t feel like typing out.

This is just a old similar version of gt with free mods and stuff but one time I was lagging very bad cuz I pressed low graphics (using the free mods) and I was trying to turn it off (Also was in a pub lobby) and this guy was saying that I could banned and I very confused and then just told everyone to report me and I got scared so I left. Pls tell me if its possible to get banned by just flying around the map with the free mods and the guy telling ppl to report me was also flying around way before I started flying.

The staff are very nice and the game is so good 👍 please get the game !!! And btw the community is very good! 

-good mods
-best community 
-very good staff 
-discord button 👍
-no rage bait 
-no toxics/hate speech
-

I was playing infection just minding my business play infection normally and this guy who had insta ban and he was abusing it and he perma banned me for no reason. My username is tester.
Good mods though.

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: I was play the game using only long arms and a mod banned me because I said who he banned cause he didn't know who he banned and banned me for 17 weeks this game sucks I hate moderators in the game

You should 100% download this game it has working mods, quest cam and much MUCH more to do! As I’m writing this it’s in the winter update which is so good!!! You should get this game (and the owner should definitely give me finger painter)

It’s a very good game with the mod menu that is very good it is my favorite gtag game. Very fun play it every day
